name: example-app
description: The example application frontends: terminal TUI + browser app over one purs-backend-es build (the example library is a root-workspace package, one level up)

scripts.bundle: npm run build:ps && vite build --config web/vite.config.mjs
scripts.simulate: npm run build:ps && cd ../../.. && node packages/example/app/terminal/run.mjs
